steps.title: Determine the percentage of students
steps.content:
The given percentages (parents 10%, teachers 50%, administrators 25%) account for: $10\% + 50\% + 25\% = 85\%$
Students make up the remainder: $100\% - 85\% = 15\%$

steps.title: Find the total committee size
steps.content:
We know 9 students represent 15% of the committee. Setting up the equation:
$$0.15 \times \text{Total} = 9$$
$$\text{Total} = \frac{9}{0.15} = 60 \text{ people}$$

steps.title: Calculate teachers and administrators, then find the difference
steps.content:
Teachers: $50\% \times 60 = 30$
Administrators: $25\% \times 60 = 15$

The difference is: $30 - 15 = 15$
There are 15 more teachers invited than administrators.
